name: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.ArtifactRepository
description: ArtifactRepository represents an artifact repository in which a controller will store its artifacts

artifactory.description: Artifactory stores artifacts to JFrog Artifactory

azure.description: Azure stores artifact in an Azure Storage account

gcs.description: GCS stores artifact in a GCS object store

oss.description: OSS stores artifact in a OSS-compliant object store

plugin.description: Plugin stores artifact in a plugin-specific artifact repository

s3.description: S3 stores artifact in a S3-compliant object store
